mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.is_sign AS "isSign", a.money AS "money", a.date AS "date", a.day AS "day", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_sign_log( id, uid, is_sign, money, date, day, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{isSign}, #{money}, #{date}, #{day}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_sign_log SET uid = #{u.id}, is_sign = #{isSign}, money = #{money}, date = #{date}, day = #{day}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
